title: Wemmbu Elytra
description: This Resource pack changes the default elytra into wemmbu's elytra style
body:
## Wemmbu Elytra


This Resource pack changes the default and boring look of the elytra texture into **wemmbu's** elytra design for fun and for fans
of wemmbu




## Disclaimer!!


This pack is purely**cosmetic** and does not give any in game benefits 

you can edit this pack but **do NOT redistribute** it on another website or app
